errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate tool to track applications, manage interviews, and land your dream job.
landing.feature1Desc: Visualize your applications through Table, Kanban, Timeline, and Calendar views. Track location, work type (remote, on-site, hybrid), and days in office for each role.
landing.feature2Desc: Capture job details directly from LinkedIn, Greenhouse, and more with a single click.
landing.feature3Desc: Track your funnel, analyze interview performance, and see where you're succeeding.
landing.feature4Desc: Keep your data safe and synced with your own Google Sheets for easy backup and sharing.
landing.feature5Desc: Scan your Gmail for application confirmations, rejections, and next steps. Preview results and add or update applications in your tracker with one click.
landing.feature6Desc: Install the app on your phone or desktop as a PWA. Secure login with automatic token refresh keeps you signed in across Sheets and Gmail without re-login.
landing.footer: © 2025 Job Application Tracker. Master your career path.

backupSync.title: Backup & Sync
backupSync.subtitle: Keep your data safe and accessible from any device.

notLoggedIn.title: Sync Across Devices
notLoggedIn.description: Keep your applications and opportunities safe and accessible from any device.
notLoggedIn.privacyNote: Your data stays in your browser by default. Creating an account enables cloud backup and cross-device sync only.

loggedIn.autoSyncNote: Data syncs automatically when you make changes.

welcome.title: You're signed in!
welcome.message: Your data will now automatically sync across all your devices. You can manage sync settings in Backup & Sync.

merge.title: Data Conflict
merge.description: You have existing data on this device and in the cloud. How would you like to handle this?
merge.useCloudDesc: Replace local data with your cloud backup. Local-only items will be lost.
merge.keepLocalDesc: Keep what's on this device. Cloud data will be overwritten on next sync.
merge.mergeBothDesc: Combine data from both sources. Duplicates are resolved automatically.
merge.notSyncedBanner: Data not synced — choose how to handle your data
merge.resolveError: Failed to resolve data conflict. Your local data is preserved.
merge.reopenFailed: Failed to check cloud data. Please try again.

errors.syncFailed: Sync failed — your changes are saved locally and will sync when connection is restored.

footer.vibecoded: Vibecoded with love ❤️ by <link>godie</link> with cursor v{{version}} ({{year}})

common.loginError: Login successful but failed to store credentials securely.
common.loginFailed: Failed to login with Google. Please try again.
common.logoutPartial: Logged out (some credentials may remain on server).

home.noApplications: Use the "+ Add Entry" button to start tracking your applications!

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Application
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete the application for "{{position}}" at {{company}}? This action will mark it as deleted.

success.captured: New job opportunity captured from LinkedIn!
success.deleted: Application "{{position}}" at {{company}} has been marked as deleted.

support.title: Community and Support
support.subtitle: Help us improve the tool or support development.
support.donationsDesc: If this tool has been useful to you and you want to support its maintenance and new features, consider buying us a coffee.
support.suggestionsDesc: Share your ideas directly with us. Every submission goes into a secure queue so we can review it later.
support.explanationPlaceholder: Tell us more about your idea or the problem you found...
support.submitError: We couldn't send your suggestion. Please try again in a moment.
support.submitInfo: Suggestions are stored on a lightweight PHP + SQLite queue that we download and process manually.
support.captchaDesc: Enter the digits displayed to prove you're human.
support.captchaRequired: Please complete the captcha before sending your suggestion.
support.captchaError: We couldn't generate the captcha. Refresh and try again.
support.explanationRequired: Please describe your idea before sending it.
support.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
support.howItWorksDesc: We now store suggestions in a lightweight server queue. Each submission uses a short numeric captcha to keep bots away so the server doesn't get flooded.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your application tracking experience. All changes are saved locally in your browser.

sections.fieldsDesc: Manage which standard fields are visible in your application forms and tables.
sections.viewDesc: Choose your preferred layout for browsing your job applications.
sections.dateDesc: Set your preferred date display format to match your region or preference.
sections.customDesc: Add specialized fields like 'Recruiter Phone' or 'Salary Range' to your tracking.
sections.interviewingDesc: Define custom interview stages that match your specific recruitment process.
sections.atsSearchDesc: Configure search filters to quickly find jobs on company ATS platforms.
sections.emailScanDesc: Automate your tracking by scanning your Gmail for application confirmations.
sections.cloudDesc: Securely back up your data and sync across multiple devices using your account.
sections.toolsDesc: Data management tools: CSV, backup, restore, and debug utilities.
sections.dateDesc: Choose how dates should be displayed throughout the application.

fields.title: Application Fields Configuration
fields.desc: Choose which columns you want to see in your Applications table and adjust their order.

view.title: Default View
view.desc: Choose which view should be displayed when you open the Applications page.

custom.title: Custom Fields
custom.desc: Create your own fields to track additional information about your applications.
custom.label: Field Label *
custom.optionsDesc: Enter one option per line. These will appear as dropdown options.
custom.noCustom: No custom fields yet. Create one above to get started!

interviewing.title: Interview Events
interviewing.desc: Manage custom interview event types that will be available when creating timeline events.
interviewing.label: Event Label *
interviewing.noEvents: No custom interview events yet. Create one above to get started!

emailScan.title: Scan Gmail for Applications
emailScan.subtitle: Find confirmations, rejections and next steps in your Gmail to automate your tracker.
emailScan.invalidJson: Provided JSON is invalid or has an incorrect format.
emailScan.duplicateWarning: You already have an application for this position at this company!
emailScan.nothingFound: No new applications or updates found.
emailScan.signInRequired: Sign in with Google (with Gmail access) to scan emails.
emailScan.googleTokenExpired: Your Google session has expired. Please reconnect your account.
emailScan.googleNotLinked: Connect your Google account to scan Gmail
emailScan.googleNotLinkedDesc: Even if you signed up with email, you can link your Google account to enable Gmail scanning.
emailScan.googleSessionExpired: Google session expired — reconnect your account
emailScan.googleSessionExpiredDesc: Your Google session has expired or been revoked. Re-link your Google account to continue scanning Gmail.
emailScan.scanError: Failed to scan emails. Try again.
emailScan.rateLimitError: Too many requests. Gmail rate limit exceeded. Please try again in a few minutes.
emailScan.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one item to apply.
emailScan.applyError: Failed to apply changes. Try again.
emailScan.geminiError: Failed to process with Gemini. Try again.
emailScan.geminiKeyConfiguredDesc: Your key is encrypted and stored securely. Use it to process emails directly via Gemini API.
emailScan.geminiKeyNotConfiguredDesc: Set up your Gemini API key to enable direct API processing for email scanning.

cloud.googleOAuthError: Error connecting to Google. Please try again.
cloud.googleLinkConflict: This Google account is already linked to another user
cloud.linkGoogleAriaLabel: Link Google account to enable synchronization

csv.heading: CSV
csv.title: CSV Import / Export
csv.desc: Export your applications to CSV format or import applications from a CSV file.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.desc: Create a full backup of all your data or restore from a previous backup.
backup.warning: Restoring a backup will replace all current data. Make sure you have a current backup before proceeding.

debug.title: Debug / Raw Data
debug.desc: View the raw JSON data stored in your browser. Useful for troubleshooting.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.desc: These actions cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.
danger.warning: These actions are irreversible. Please make sure you have a backup before proceeding.

tools.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete ALL data? This action cannot be undone.
tools.importError: Failed to import data. Invalid file format.

opportunities.title: Interesting Opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Track interesting job opportunities captured from LinkedIn, added manually, or discovered through the integrated job search across Jooble, TheirStack, Adzuna, and Careerjet. Click Apply to convert them into applications.

jobSearch.title: Job Search
jobSearch.subtitle: Search across Jooble, TheirStack, Adzuna, and Careerjet in one place. Enter keywords and location, then use advanced filters to narrow by source or tech stack.
jobSearch.keywordsHint: Try job titles, skills, or companies — e.g. "react developer", "product manager", "customer success"
jobSearch.techStackHint: Filter by technologies — uses TheirStack data
jobSearch.noResults: No jobs found. Try broader keywords, a different location, or switch the source in advanced filters.

opportunities.noOpportunitiesDesc: Find jobs by using the search above (Jooble, TheirStack, Adzuna, Careerjet), install the Chrome extension to capture listings from LinkedIn and other sites, or add one manually.
opportunities.searchPlaceholder: Filter saved opportunities by position, company, or location...

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Opportunity
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{position}}" at {{company}}?

success.addedToApps: "{{position}}" at {{company}} has been added to your applications!
success.convertError: Failed to convert opportunity to application. Please try again.
success.addError: Failed to add opportunity. Please try again.

atsSearch.title: Direct ATS Search
atsSearch.subtitle: Bypass LinkedIn's limitations by searching company platforms directly.

geminiKeyModal.setupDescription: Enter your Gemini API key and create a master password to encrypt it.
geminiKeyModal.unlockDescription: Enter your master password to decrypt your stored API key.
geminiKeyModal.securityNote: Your API key is encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored locally. The master password is never stored.

errors.noKeyStored: No encrypted key found. Please set up your API key first.
errors.wrongPassword: Incorrect master password. Please try again.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

kanban.startAdding: Start adding entries to see them organized here.

timeline.startAdding: Start adding entries to see the interview timeline.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noApplications: No applications yet. Add some to see them on the calendar.

sheets.title: Google Sheets Integration
sheets.loginRequired: Google Sheets Sync: Please log in with Google to enable spreadsheet synchronization.
sheets.googleNotLinked: Connect your Google account to enable sync
sheets.googleNotLinkedDesc: Even if you signed up with email, you can link your Google account to use Google Sheets sync and Gmail scan.
sheets.googleSessionExpired: Google session expired — reconnect your account
sheets.googleSessionExpiredDesc: Your Google session has expired or been revoked. Re-link your Google account to continue using Google Sheets sync.
sheets.loginFirst: Please log in with Google first
sheets.createSheetDesc: Create a Google Sheet to sync your job applications.
sheets.spreadsheetCreated: Spreadsheet created! Opening in new tab...
sheets.syncSuccess: Successfully synced {{count}} application to Google Sheets!
sheets.syncSuccess_plural: Successfully synced {{count}} applications to Google Sheets!
sheets.noSpreadsheet: No spreadsheet found. Please create one first.
sheets.selectDesc: Enter the spreadsheet ID or full URL from Google Sheets

welcome.title: Welcome to JAJAT!
welcome.desc: Your personal job application tracker. Let's take a quick tour to help you get started.

applications.title: Track Applications
applications.desc: Add every job you apply to. Record position, company, status, dates, and interview timeline all in one place.

opportunities.title: Capture Opportunities
opportunities.desc: Save interesting job postings before applying. Use the Chrome extension to grab jobs from LinkedIn, Greenhouse, and more.

views.title: Multiple Views
views.desc: Switch between Table, Timeline, Kanban, and Calendar views to visualize your pipeline the way you prefer.

sync.title: Sync & Backup
sync.desc: Sign in to back up your data and access it from any device. You can also sync with Google Sheets.

insights.title: Gain Insights
insights.desc: See analytics on your applications, interviews, and rejection rate to understand and improve your search.

extension.title: Chrome Extension
extension.desc: Install our extension to capture jobs directly from LinkedIn, Greenhouse, AshbyHQ, and other platforms with one click.

start.title: Ready to Start?
start.desc: Click the button below to begin tracking your first application. Good luck with your job search!

gdpr.title: We value your privacy
gdpr.description: We use cookies and local storage to keep your data safe and provide essential functionality. You can read more in our
gdpr.essentialCookiesDesc: Required for the app to function. Includes authentication and session management.
gdpr.analyticsCookiesDesc: Help us understand how users interact with the app to improve the experience.
gdpr.storageCookiesDesc: Stores your application data locally in your browser for offline access.
gdpr.authCookiesDesc: Keeps you signed in across sessions when you choose to log in.

landing.title: Track Your Job Search — Free & Private
landing.description: JAJAT is a free, privacy-first job application tracker. Manage applications, interviews, and offers with timeline views, Kanban boards, and Google Sheets sync.

applications.title: My Applications
applications.description: View and manage all your job applications in one place.

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.description: Browse and manage job opportunities captured from LinkedIn, Greenhouse, and more.

insights.title: Insights & Analytics
insights.description: Visualize your job search funnel, interview conversion rates, and application trends.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your JAJAT preferences, custom fields, and integrations.

support.title: Support & Suggestions
support.description: Get help or share feedback with the JAJAT team.

jobDetails.notFoundDesc: The job application you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
